summary: MQ-2 combustible gas and smoke sensor with analog output. Detects LPG, propane, methane, alcohol, hydrogen, smoke. Output voltage proportional to gas concentration.
notes: MQ-2 requires 5V heater supply and >24h burn-in for first use.
Analog output 0~5V; use voltage divider (2:1) for 3.3V ADC input.
Digital output (DO) has adjustable threshold via onboard potentiometer.
Warm-up time ~20 seconds after power-on before readings are stable.

app_logic_snippets.init:
MQ2_Init();  /* configure ADC channel */
HAL_Delay(20000);  /* 20s warm-up */
app_logic_snippets.notes: ReadPPM() uses approximate Rs/Ro curve; for accurate readings, calibrate in clean air first with MQ2_Calibrate(). SMOKE_THRESHOLD_PPM typically set to 300-1000.
